prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2021–2026年排名分别为第12、12、11、11、12、13名，近年稳定在Top13以内，2026年较2025年下降1位，属正常波动；2026年声誉评价偏负面（学术不端事件11起），但2025年曾转偏正面（管理回应获好评）；抖音热度总排名第29（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上；历史投档异常 方面，2022年多省爆冷（中关注）、2023年低关注、2024年中关注、2025年中关注（广东报考热情受影响），断档信号近年趋于减弱；23个A-及以上学科，包括 工商管理A+、生态学A+、临床医学A-、口腔医学A-、计算机科学与技术A-、法学A-、数学A、物理学A、生物学A等，学科实力雄厚，对高分考生持续有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、临床医学、电气工程等专业2024–2026年持续高热推荐；本省2026年物理类考生约20.4万人（按历史比例估算），较2025年19.2万人增加约1.2 万人（+6.1%），竞争加剧，近年波动不大；中山大学位于广东，与福建同属华南，地域偏好较强；该校在本省招生占比约3. 9%（2024年30人/全国759人），属中等水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合扩招6人（+5.2%）、本省物理类考生增加约6.1%、声誉偏负面、抖音热度较热、学科实力强劲等因素，扩招效 应与考生增加效应大致抵消，但声誉偏负面及排名略降使竞争略加剧，在2025年基准4442名基础上预计最低位次小幅后移至约4611名，区间4111–5111名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 2810 → 3511 → 3010 → 4780 → 4442. In the past three years, the ranking has generally shifted backward. In 2024, it dropped significantly to 4780, then slightly recovered to 4442 in 2025. The baseline for 2025 is about 4442. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 118 in 2021, 116 in 2022, 111 in 2023, 114 in 2024, and 115 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 121 students, an increase of 6 students (+5.2%) compared to 2025, which slightly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking from 2021 to 2026, the university ranked 12th, 12th, 11th, 11th, 12th, and 13th respectively, remaining stable within the top 13 in recent years. In 2026, it dropped one place compared to 2025, which is a normal fluctuation. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (11 academic misconduct incidents), but in 2025 it turned somewhat positive (management response received praise). On Douyin, the overall popularity ranking is 29th (relatively hot), with medium to high short video exposure. Regarding historical admission anomalies, there were cold snaps in multiple provinces in 2022 (medium attention), low attention in 2023, medium attention in 2024, and medium attention in 2025 (Guangdong's application enthusiasm was affected). The signal of admission gaps has weakened in recent years. The university has 23 A- or above disciplines, including Business Administration A+, Ecology A+, Clinical Medicine A-, Stomatology A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, Law A-, Mathematics A, Physics A, Biology A, etc. Its strong disciplinary strength continues to attract high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Clinical Medicine, and Electrical Engineering have been highly recommended from 2024 to 2026. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in the province is approximately 204,000 (estimated based on historical proportions), an increase of about 12,000 (+6.1%) compared to 192,000 in 2025, intensifying competition, though fluctuations in recent years have been small. Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangdong, which, like Fujian, belongs to South China, so there is a strong regional preference. The university's enrollment proportion in this province is about 3.9% (30 out of 759 nationwide in 2024), which is moderate.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as an enrollment increase of 6 students (+5.2%), a provincial Physics Category examinee increase of about 6.1%, a somewhat negative reputation, relatively high Douyin popularity, and strong disciplinary strength, the enrollment expansion effect and the examinee increase effect roughly offset each other. However, the somewhat negative reputation and slight ranking drop intensify competition slightly. Based on the 2025 baseline of 4442, the minimum ranking is expected to shift slightly backward to about 4611, with a range of 4111 to 5111.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 4111 to 5111, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<4111), you can primarily target top-tier majors such as Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Program) and Stomatology (5+3 Integrated Program). If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>5111), you should mainly consider Tier 3 majors, supplemented by less popular directions in Tier 2.
